title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: Cloud engineers should prioritize understanding fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, and performance over coding alone. AI agents can generate infrastructure code, so junior engineers should focus on knowing what to build and reviewing AI output against core engineering principles.
